evals.name: direct-trigger-en
evals.prompt: fix issues in my draft article
evals.expected_output: Skill 'ca-debug-draft' is triggered and produces structured output
expectations: Output follows the skill's documented workflow steps

evals.name: direct-trigger-zh
evals.prompt: 帮我诊断这篇草稿的问题
evals.expected_output: 技能 'ca-debug-draft' 被正确触发并生成结构化输出
expectations: 正确触发了 ca-debug-draft 技能
输出遵循技能文档中的工作流步骤

evals.name: indirect-trigger
evals.prompt: Something feels off about my article but I can't figure out what
evals.expected_output: Skill 'ca-debug-draft' is correctly matched despite indirect phrasing
expectations: Routes to ca-debug-draft skill despite not using exact keywords
Asks for necessary clarifications before proceeding

evals.name: output-structure
evals.prompt: fix issues in my draft article. Use minimal sample data — I just want to verify the output format is correct.
evals.expected_output: Produces output matching the skill's documented deliverable format
expectations: Artifact is saved to the correct path per conventions
Markdown formatting is correct if applicable
